mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT e.id, e.scenario_id, e.execution_type, e.execution_time, e.development_time, e.maintenance_time, e.manual_test_time, e.execution_status, c.project_id from auto_execution_record e LEFT JOIN auto_case_roi c on e.scenario_id = c.scenario_id WHERE e.is_deleted = 0 and c.is_deleted = 0 and e.execution_time >= #{startTime} and e.execution_time <= #{endTime} and e.execution_type = #{executionType} and c.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY e.id desc
